message:
feat: add VCR streaming integration tests for Cohere and OpenAI Responses providers

Adds 12 new VCR-backed scenarios (6 per provider) covering simple text,
multi-paragraph, unicode, single tool call, multiple tool calls, and
max-tokens responses. Tests gracefully skip when cassettes are missing
in playback mode and fully exercise the streaming pipeline when recorded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
